response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad, long-tenured individual contributor, but this role requires a seasoned executive who has owned engineering organizations, scaled teams, and architected production agentic-AI systems at consequential scale. Every role in the candidate's 30-year career carries an IC title (Senior/Staff Engineer); there is no evidence of people management, org scaling to 30+ engineers, P&L ownership, board communication, or governing external delivery partners. The agentic-AI exposure at re:cinq is described in contributory terms ('contribute to AI-agent infrastructure') rather than as strategic ownership or production architecture. The fintech exposure at RIDE Capital and Optilyz is limited in scope and depth relative to the credit-risk, working-capital, and real-time trade-decisioning systems the role demands. The candidate may be a strong senior IC, but does not meet the executive bar this position requires.
strengths: Demonstrated distributed-systems and low-latency backend depth, including microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Early hands-on exposure to agentic tooling and MCP framework development at re:cinq, showing awareness of current AI-infrastructure paradigms
Broad polyglot full-stack background spanning TypeScript, Node.js, D, C++, and embedded systems, signaling strong technical adaptability
concerns: No engineering leadership experience whatsoever — the entire career history reflects IC and staff-level individual-contributor roles with zero evidence of managing, hiring, or scaling engineering teams

Agentic AI work is described in supporting, contributory language rather than as architect or production owner, falling well short of the hard requirement for demonstrated production multi-agent system delivery
No evidence of executive responsibilities: board-level communication, technical roadmap ownership, outsourced-engineering governance, or fintech regulatory and compliance infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Absence of executive or engineering-leadership experience
No production multi-agent AI system ownership
Distributed systems and fintech-adjacent backend exposure
